library.name: libbitcoin-system

repository.name: libbitcoin-server
repository.description: Bitcoin Full Node and Query Server

flag.comment: Enable questionable/easy to avoid error warnings.
Enables extra warnings not enabled by -Wall.
Enables all warnings demanded by strict ISO C/C+.
Disallow warning on style order of declarations.
Suppress warning for incomplete field initialization.
Ignore comments within comments or commenting of backslash extended lines.
Suppress warning for copy of implicitly generated copy constructor.
Suppress warning for ignored attributes (arising on template arguments).
Hide internal functions from external libs.
Allow use of C99 'long long' type.
Disable warning when a variable might not be initialized on all code paths.
Suppresses warnings related to the use of uninitialized variables.

dependency.name: UltrafastSecp256k1
dependency.comment: Build Ultra high-performance secp256k1 ECC engine.

configuration.name: nix-base
configuration.description: Factored base settings for non-windows *nix based platforms.

configuration.name: nix-gnu-release-static
configuration.description: Release build with static linking and standard optimizations.

configuration.name: nix-gnu-release-shared
configuration.description: Release build with shared linking and standard optimizations.

hint.text: Toolchain default behavior will occur if no value specified.
Toolchain default behavior will occur if no value specified.

option.comment: Interpret build-obj-dir as relative to project sources.
Number of jobs to run simultaneously.
Use existing sources in relevant paths.

ignore.name: .libs
ignore.comment: libtool temporary libraries and object files

option.name: shared
option.comment: Required for dynamically linking boost test.
